top_findings.summary: The skill requests unrestricted Read, Write, and Glob permissions to the entire workspace without demonstrating why such broad access is necessary for its stated purpose of "hypothesis validation and closed-loop learning." While some file access is needed for state management, the skill description shows it primarily operates on specific files in `grimoires/rune/` directory, yet requests permissions to read/write anywhere. Additionally, the "file modification monitoring" feature that starts automatic 30-minute monitoring windows and uses git diff on any generated file constitutes continuous surveillance beyond the core purpose.
